event1.text: I've seen that voice signature before. But I don't remember where. And that should scare all of us.
Stop listening to him. The black box is corrupt. And now it's corrupting him.
I can recover the missing voice layer. It won't be fast. Give me a minute.

event0.text: Voice recovery in progress... You will be notified when analysis is complete.

event1.text: No. No, that's impossible. I remember saying it. I remember the room. But I don't remember opening the station.
I remember saying those words. But I don't remember why. Something is missing.

backgroundEvent2.text: Ask Noah what happened before the pod.

backgroundEvent4.text: Ask Hale why he locked the pod.

event1.text: Don't believe what you're hearing. Someone is manipulating the records. You think memories can't be edited? Look at this station. Everything here has been edited.

event0.title: MEMORY FRAGMENT
event0.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: MEMORY INCONSISTENCY DETECTED
SOURCE: UNKNOWN

event1.text: If my memories are wrong... Then somebody changed them. And if they changed mine... Whose memories am I carrying?
